content: whatsmeow store/sqlstore: Container wraps a SQL DB holding multiple device sessions. sqlstore.New(ctx, dialect, address, log) supports 'sqlite3' and 'postgres' only. NewWithDB(*sql.DB, dialect, log) wraps an EXISTING database/sql connection — whatsmeow uses database/sql interface, NOT pgx native, so PerGo has TWO driver stacks (pgxpool for app + *sql.DB for whatsmeow) on the same PostgreSQL. PostgresArrayWrapper must be set (pq.Array) when using lib/pq. Container.Upgrade(ctx) runs whatsmeow's OWN schema migrations (separate from goose). Container.GetDevice(jid) returns *store.Device or nil (param usually must be AD-JID). GetAllDevices loads all paired devices for startup reconnection. NewDevice()+Save() (auto-called on pairing). Device.Delete(ctx) for logout. Two-store model: whatsmeow owns signal-protocol tables (prekeys/sessions/identities); PerGo owns workspace metadata.
